title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at DXC Technology India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at DXC Technology India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DXC Technology India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About DXC Technology India:
DXC Technology India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DXC Technology India!
